User.title: User Account
User.description: A user's profile and mining configs including credentials, crypto balances, and e-wallet settings.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user account.

isAdmin.description: Whether the user is an administrator.

joinedAt.description: The date when the user registered in the system.

miningConfig.description: The complete mining power, wallet linkage, and histories.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection storing all independent user states, wallets, and transaction histories securely.
